name: Australian Foundation Investment Company Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.7000, stop A$6.2667, target A$7.9999 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
